sql: WITH RECURSIVE org_tree AS (SELECT id, name, parent_id, 1 as level FROM departments WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND name = #{rootDept} UNION ALL SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, ot.level + 1 FROM departments d JOIN org_tree ot ON d.parent_id = ot.id WHERE ot.level < #{maxLevel}) SELECT * FROM org_tree ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
WITH RECURSIVE org_tree AS (
    SELECT id, name, parent_id, 1 as level
    FROM departments
    <where>
        <if test="rootDept != null">
            AND parent_id IS NULL AND name = #{rootDept}
        </if>
    </where>
    UNION ALL
    SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, ot.level + 1
    FROM departments d
    JOIN org_tree ot ON d.parent_id = ot.id
    <where>
        <if test="maxLevel != null">
            AND ot.level < #{maxLevel}
        </if>
    </where>
)
SELECT * FROM org_tree
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
